トピック.授業外学習2: An average of 2-3 hours out of class work will be assigned each week. It is the student's responsibility to not fall behind on any long-term projects as this may increase their weekly workload. Students are expected to complete all assigned tasks to prepare for the next class.

教科書/Required texts1: Hartmann, Pamela; Douglas, Nancy & Boon, Andrew
学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
Each class subject is arranged on the curriculum based on the Diploma Policy (DP) and Curriculum Policy (CP) established by each faculty and graduate school. 
By studying this course with DP/CP in mind, you will develop the abilities expected by each faculty and graduate school. 
The DP, CP, and curriculum table (list of classes, etc.) for each faculty/graduate school are posted in the link below, so please use them as a reference for your study plan. 
https://kwic .kwansei.ac.jp/cabinet/reference?typeCd=0&cabinetId=557&directLink=1
